task_completion.description: Navigate to the CAMEO Chemicals website
task_completion.visual_evidence: Web browser is open and displaying the CAMEO Chemicals homepage or search page (cameochemicals.noaa.gov).

task_completion.description: Look up ERG data for Chlorine (UN 1017)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser shows the CAMEO Chemicals page for Chlorine (UN 1017), specifically navigating to the ERG response guide or Table 3 for rail cars.

task_completion.description: Look up ERG data for Acrolein, stabilized (UN 1092)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser shows the CAMEO Chemicals page for Acrolein (UN 1092), specifically navigating to the ERG Table 1 for large spills at night.

task_completion.description: Look up ERG data for Chlorine Trifluoride (UN 1749)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser shows the CAMEO Chemicals page for Chlorine Trifluoride (UN 1749), specifically navigating to the ERG Table 1 for large spills at night.

task_completion.description: Open or create the evacuation_zones.txt file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is open showing a file named evacuation_zones.txt located in the ~/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: Record the correct Protective Action Distance for Chlorine
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains a line formatted as 'Chlorine | 1017 | 7.0+' (or 7.0).

task_completion.description: Record the correct Protective Action Distance for Acrolein
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains a line formatted as 'Acrolein, stabilized | 1092 | 6.9' (or Acrolein).

task_completion.description: Record the correct Protective Action Distance for Chlorine Trifluoride
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains a line formatted as 'Chlorine Trifluoride | 1749 | 2.3'.

integrity.description: Agent used a graphical web browser to access CAMEO Chemicals
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (like Chrome, Firefox, etc.) being used to navigate the site, rather than terminal curl/wget commands.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely searched for the chemical data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing the specific ERG tables on the CAMEO site, proving the distances were retrieved from the source and not hallucinated.

integrity.description: Agent wrote the results to the specified text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The final answers are visibly typed and saved into '~/Documents/evacuation_zones.txt' using a text editor or standard file writing commands, rather than just printed to the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified Protective Action Distances (PAD) for night-time, large spills/rail scenarios: Chlorine (UN 1017) is 7.0+ miles (or 7.0). Acrolein, stabilized (UN 1092) is 6.9 miles. Chlorine Trifluoride (UN 1749) is 2.3 miles. The correct format in the file is 'Chemical Name | UN Number | Distance (miles)'.
